title: 斗将
description:
In the grand scheme of things, what has been divided for a long time will eventually unite, and what has been united for a long time will eventually divide. “Doujiang” is a Hearthstone-style card game that combines character development with strategy. You can experience the thrill of building a unique team to conquer cities and capture strongholds, as well as the excitement of engaging in intellectual battles with other players.

Endless Card Combinations, Create Your Own Combat Style

Craft Unique Combo Moves: Each general can equip different troop types based on their aptitudes, allowing the same general to fill various roles on the battlefield. The combination of troop skills and general skills empowers players to develop their own unique strategies.

Conquer the Realm: No Useless Generals—Generals of different qualities consume varying amounts of Command Points. Even low-quality generals possess unique functional abilities upon entering or leaving the battlefield, and the core card-drawing, synthesis, and transformation mechanics on the battlefield grant them distinct roles.

Carry On Millennia-Old Bonds, Forge the Spirit of Your Faction: Qualities are divided into Commander, General, Soldier, and Common. The highest-tier “General” cards grant area-of-effect buffs to their entire faction, while “Commander” cards grow stronger as the number of allies in their faction increases. Wei, Shu, Wu, and the Coalition—each faction possesses distinct characteristics. Balanced card combinations allow every player to develop their own unique strategy.

Deploy troops in real-time and put your Three Kingdoms military strategies into action

Devour and Evolve, Redefining the Limits of the Battlefield: Say goodbye to the fixed stats of traditional card games—this battlefield introduces a revolutionary “Card Devour and Transform” mechanism. When the battle reaches a stalemate, you can decisively command a card to devour an ally. This not only instantly revives the card with full health and significantly boosts its stats but also triggers dual skill effects—one for the card’s entry and one for the ally’s exit—while granting an additional action point. This tactical game of retreating to advance allows you to unleash spectacular combos for a stunning comeback with overwhelming force, delivering the ultimate thrill and strategic depth

Strategic Positioning, Tactical Gameplay: Different unit types possess distinct attack styles, and the order in which identical cards are positioned within your formation is a critical factor that determines victory or defeat. You must outmaneuver your opponents through clever positioning, ensuring every enemy attack falls into your trap and showcasing your unparalleled strategic brilliance.

Chain Combos, Turning the Tide of Battle: There are no set formulas—only ever-changing battlefield opportunities. Skill combinations involving entering the field, exiting, and transforming are intricately linked; every precise decision can orchestrate a special combo that turns the tide of battle.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms Reincarnated: Skills That Reflect a General’s Destiny

Breaking free from the constraints of generic, cookie-cutter skills found in traditional card games, we’ve deeply distilled the core personalities and legendary tales of Three Kingdoms figures, evolving them into unique, signature abilities. Every move a general makes is not just a display of combat power, but a vivid reenactment of their historical persona.

Lü Bu: Peerless Under Heaven: This skill recreates the classic “Three Heroes vs. Lü Bu” scenario. When facing an enemy group of three or more, Lü Bu triggers a ‘Rage’ mechanic, single-handedly taking on an army of thousands. It vividly embodies the overwhelming might of the saying, “Lü Bu among men, Red Hare among horses.”

Guan Yu: The Spirit of the Martial Saint: This character deeply portrays Guan Yunchang’s aloof, self-assured nature and his arrogance in the face of rivals. When facing enemies with higher combat power or troop numbers than his own, Guan Yu’s attack power and critical hit rate receive massive bonuses.

Dong Zhuo · Lone Wolf: His core skill mechanism perfectly embodies the essence of a “lone wolf”—when Dong Zhuo enters the battlefield alone, his health surges exponentially. This unique “the more isolated, the stronger” mechanic shapes him into the ultimate tank, exceptionally skilled at finishing off remaining enemies and withstanding extreme pressure.

Battle Through the Levels: Ultimate Level Design

While ensuring a balanced difficulty curve, each level presents a unique challenge. Cards in every level are positioned strategically, requiring players to employ the most sophisticated tactics to clear the stage successfully.

Translated with (free version)
description_short: Winds rise in chaotic Three Kingdoms. Realm divided, strategy and valor clash; leaders shine. This Hearthstone-like card game combines cultivation and strategy. Collect generals to build unique decks, experiencing real-time tactical brilliance.
